title: Security Metrics & DORA KPI Engine — Live Pipeline + Dashboard Wiring
description: security_metrics.py has real DORA/MTTD/MTTR logic with industry benchmark data (Verizon DBIR 2024, Ponemon/IBM) and OKR tracking, but metric ingestion relies on caller-supplied data rather than auto-pulling from the 300+ SQLite engines. The sbom and beast_mode_integration tests confirm coverage of the supply-chain risk domain. No scheduler drives periodic metric snapshots, and the frontend Security Metrics dashboard (/security-metrics) still uses mock data.
missing: Auto-ingest pipeline: cron job that queries the 60+ domain DBs hourly and writes computed MTTD/MTTR/CFR/OKR snapshots into security_metrics.db
Live frontend wiring: replace mock data in SecurityMetricsDashboard with /api/v1/kpi and /api/v1/security-metrics real endpoints
Peer-benchmarking API: expose /api/v1/metrics/benchmark that compares org metrics against Verizon DBIR/Ponemon percentiles and returns percentile rank
